content: Hi, I'm Skyler. I'm a Podcast Host, and I'm working on a new true crime series. I'm really excited to share it with my listeners.
That sounds like a great project! True crime podcasts are always so popular. What inspired you to get into podcasting?

I've always loved storytelling, and I think podcasting is a great way to share stories with a wide audience. Plus, I get to interview really interesting people and learn about new topics all the time.
That's great! It's wonderful that you have a passion for storytelling and interviewing. Do you have any favorite podcasts or hosts that you look up to?

Yeah, I love the 'Crime Junkie' podcast. I think the hosts are really engaging and do a great job of storytelling. I'm also a big fan of hiking and tennis, and I try to get out and do those things as much as I can.

Those are great hobbies! It's wonderful that you prioritize your free time and make sure to do things that bring you joy. Do you find that your podcasting work informs or influences your hobbies at all?

Actually, yes. I've been thinking about how I can use my podcasting skills to create more engaging stories about my hiking and tennis adventures. Maybe I'll even start a new podcast series about outdoor adventures!
That's a great idea! I'm sure your listeners would love to hear about your outdoor adventures. Have you thought about collaborating with other podcasters or influencers in the outdoor space?
Yeah, I've thought about it. I'd love to collaborate with some other podcasters and create a network of outdoor enthusiasts. Maybe we could even plan a big hiking trip together sometime.
That sounds like a blast! I'm sure you'll have a great time planning and executing the trip. Do you have any favorite hiking spots in the Salt Lake City area, where you live?

Yeah, I love hiking in the Wasatch Mountains. The scenery is just beautiful, and there are so many great trails to choose from. I'm also working on my part-time MBA, so I've been trying to balance my schoolwork with my podcasting and hiking.
That's impressive! It's great that you're pursuing your education and passions at the same time. Do you find that your MBA program is helping you with your podcasting work, or vice versa?

Actually, yes. I've been learning a lot about marketing and business, and I've been able to apply those skills to my podcasting work. It's been really helpful to have a more business-savvy approach to my podcast.

That's great to hear! It's wonderful that you're able to apply your skills and knowledge in a way that benefits your podcast. I'm sure your listeners appreciate the hard work you put into creating engaging content.
Thanks, I appreciate it. I'm just going to go work on my podcast some more now, and then head out for a hike later this afternoon.
Sounds like a plan! Enjoy your hike, and I hope you have a productive afternoon working on your podcast. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need any help or just want to chat.
